layoutRegions.name: recovery-summary
layoutRegions.purpose: Readiness counts for tracked assets, ready keys, drill items, and blocked recovery paths.

layoutRegions.name: asset-ledger
layoutRegions.purpose: Recovery key, backup token, passphrase, owner, verification, and storage-location inventory.

layoutRegions.name: drill-and-escrow-panels
layoutRegions.purpose: Recovery drill steps, escrow coverage, fallback notes, and rollback-safe drill windows.

components.name: AssetCard
components.purpose: Focusable recovery asset card with state, owner, verification date, and storage location.
interactions: state badge distinguishes ready, drill, and blocked assets
layout does not shift when values wrap

components.name: DrillStep
components.purpose: Recovery dry-run command and evidence expectation.
interactions: focus state is visible for keyboard review

components.name: EscrowCheck
components.purpose: Escrow readiness and fallback coverage for a critical service.

acceptanceChecks: Generated app imports src/omarchy-theme.css before app styles.
Every visible color comes from a --omarchy-* CSS variable or color-mix using one.
Every button, row, input, and command item has a visible :focus-visible state.
Layout remains stable at 320px, 768px, and 1280px viewport widths.
Primary content is usable on first load without a marketing interstitial.
A .desktop launcher can be generated with omarchy-native app desktop.
An opt-in theme sync hook can be generated with omarchy-native app hook.
